  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.resources.handle
Provides NetBeans-specific resource handles that bridge the IDE's Virtual File System (VFS) with the Anahata ASI resource model.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.handle
Provides metadata panels for visualizing resource connectivity attributes.

    Description
    PathHandle
    A filesystem-backed resource handle for physical local files.

    UrlHandle
